topic: Sparkling mineral water — sealed bottle CO₂ dissolved
image_prompt: SVG: sealed sparkling mineral water bottle showing CO₂ gas under high pressure dissolving into water; arrow down from gas space into water; bubbles in liquid; green label 'SPARKLING MINERAL WATER'.

topic: Sparkling mineral water — opened bottle CO₂ escapes
image_prompt: SVG: same sparkling water bottle but opened, cap removed and to the side; CO₂ cloud above neck; up arrow from liquid surface to CO₂ cloud; rapidly rising bubbles; caption 'Pressure drops → CO₂ comes out of solution'.
